title: Document interface definition for core document operations
purpose: Defines the structure and properties of document objects used throughout the application for storage, retrieval, and manipulation of document data.
module_context: Exports a single interface named Document that describes the shape of document objects with mandatory and optional fields including id, name, content, lastModified timestamp, and various optional metadata flags.

steps.content: Define the structure for document objects with required fields id, name, content, and lastModified.
Include optional fields folder, locked, deprecated, pinned, and blueprint to support document metadata and status flags.
